description: Reference to a single repository resource

iTwinId.description: Id of the iTwin this repository resource is associated with

repositoryId.description: Id of the repository that contains this resource. For Bentley repositories like iModels, this is the lowercase class. For external repositories, this is a unique identifier.

id.description: Id of the individual resource. Format depends on the repository (may be a GUID or another string identifier).

class.description: Class of the repository containing this resource, e.g. iModels, RealityData, GeographicInformationSystem.

subClass.description: SubClass of the repository type if applicable, e.g. WebMapTileService for GIS repositories.
